question: What are the admission requirements?
answer: Admission requirements vary by program. Generally, you need a high school diploma or equivalent for undergraduate programs, and a bachelor's degree for postgraduate programs. Some technical courses may require basic knowledge of programming or mathematics.

question: How do I apply for a course?
answer: You can apply online through our website or visit our campus. The process involves: 1) Fill out the application form, 2) Submit required documents (ID proof, academic transcripts), 3) Pay the registration fee, 4) Attend a counseling session. You can also start by chatting with me — I'll capture your details and our team will reach out!

question: What is the fee structure?
answer: Our fee structure depends on the course selected. Short-term certification courses range from ₹5,000 to ₹15,000, diploma programs from ₹20,000 to ₹50,000, and advanced professional programs from ₹50,000 to ₹1,50,000. EMI options and scholarships are available for eligible students.

question: Do you offer scholarships?
answer: Yes! We offer merit-based scholarships (up to 50% fee waiver), need-based financial aid, and early bird discounts for students who enroll before the deadline. Top performers in entrance assessments may receive full scholarships.

question: What are the placement statistics?
answer: Our placement record is strong: 85% of students get placed within 3 months of course completion. Average starting salary is ₹4.5 LPA, with top packages reaching ₹12 LPA. Our hiring partners include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, and several startups.

question: Do you provide placement assistance?
answer: Absolutely! We provide comprehensive placement support including: resume building workshops, mock interviews, soft skills training, portfolio development, LinkedIn optimization, and direct referrals to our 100+ hiring partners.

question: What are the class timings?
answer: We offer flexible batch timings: Morning Batch (9 AM – 12 PM), Afternoon Batch (1 PM – 4 PM), Evening Batch (6 PM – 9 PM), and Weekend Batch (Saturday & Sunday, 10 AM – 4 PM). Online live classes are also available for select courses.

question: Do you offer online classes?
answer: Yes, we offer both online live classes and hybrid (online + offline) options. Online classes are conducted via Zoom/Google Meet with recorded sessions available for revision. All study materials are accessible through our learning portal.

question: What courses do you offer?
answer: We offer a wide range of industry-relevant courses including: AI & Machine Learning, Full-Stack Web Development, Data Science & Analytics, Cloud Computing & DevOps, Cybersecurity, Mobile App Development, UI/UX Design, and Digital Marketing. Each course includes hands-on projects and industry mentorship.

question: What is the duration of courses?
answer: Course durations vary: Certification courses are 2-3 months, Diploma programs are 4-6 months, and Advanced Professional programs are 6-12 months. We also offer intensive bootcamp formats (8-12 weeks) for fast-track learning.

question: Do you provide certificates?
answer: Yes, upon successful completion of any course, you receive an industry-recognized certificate. Our certificates are validated by our industry partners and include a unique verification code. We also help students earn additional certifications from AWS, Google, Microsoft, etc.

question: Where is your campus located?
answer: Our main campus is located in the heart of the city with excellent connectivity via public transport. We have modern labs, a library, cafeteria, and recreational facilities. Contact us for the exact address and directions.

question: Can I get a demo class?
answer: Yes! We offer a free demo class for every course so you can experience our teaching methodology before enrolling. You can book a demo class through our website or simply share your contact details with me, and our team will schedule one for you.

question: What is the faculty profile?
answer: Our faculty consists of industry professionals with 5-15 years of experience from companies like Google, Amazon, Microsoft, and top startups. Many hold advanced degrees (M.Tech, PhD) and are active contributors to open-source projects and research.

question: Do you offer internship opportunities?
answer: Yes, our advanced courses include mandatory internship components with our partner companies. We also facilitate internship placements for students who complete certification courses. Internship stipends range from ₹5,000 to ₹25,000 per month.

question: What are the prerequisites for AI/ML course?
answer: For our AI/ML course, basic knowledge of Python programming and high school mathematics (linear algebra, probability, statistics) is recommended. If you're a complete beginner, we offer a 2-week foundation module to get you up to speed before the main course starts.

question: Do you offer EMI or payment plans?
answer: Yes, we offer flexible payment options: 1) Full upfront payment with 10% discount, 2) 3-month EMI (0% interest), 3) 6-month EMI (minimal interest), 4) Income Share Agreement (ISA) for select premium courses — you pay after you get placed!

question: How can I contact support?
answer: You can reach us through: Phone: +91-9876543210, Email: admissions@techinstitute.edu, WhatsApp: +91-9876543210, or visit our campus during office hours (9 AM – 6 PM, Mon-Sat). You can also chat with me anytime for instant assistance!

question: What projects will I work on during the course?
answer: Each course includes 3-5 hands-on projects based on real-world scenarios. For example, AI/ML students build a recommendation system and a chatbot, Web Dev students create full-stack e-commerce apps, and Data Science students work with real datasets from our industry partners. You'll also complete a capstone project.

question: Is there a refund policy?
answer: Yes, we have a transparent refund policy: Full refund if you withdraw within 7 days of enrollment and before attending 3 classes. 50% refund within 15 days. No refund after 15 days. Demo class attendees can make informed decisions before committing.
